rules: CRITICAL: Google Flights date picker is unreliable. After 1 failed attempt, construct the URL directly with date params: /travel/flights?hl=en&curr=USD&tfs=...
Results load asynchronously — wait 2s after search before reading results
For round-trip, ensure BOTH departure and return dates are set before reading prices
Click the 'Cheapest' tab to see lowest fares, then verify the displayed price matches
Sort dropdown is top-right labeled 'Sort By'
Ratings and review counts are visible in list view — don't click into individual recipes
For recipe collections, scroll through the numbered list — items are displayed in order
Dismiss cookie banner before interacting with the page
CRITICAL: For date selection, if the calendar is unreliable, construct URL with check-in/check-out params: ?checkin=YYYY-MM-DD&checkout=YYYY-MM-DD
URL tracking params change frequently — ignore query string differences
After applying filters, wait for results to reload and verify the filter chips are active
For rating filters: use the URL param &nflt=review_score%3D90 for 9+ rating
If no hotels match ALL criteria, report what was found with closest matches
Use the search bar at top for finding repos/issues/code
Star counts and language info visible on repo cards — read directly from search results
For repository file lists, the most recent commit info is visible next to each file
Dismiss location/delivery popups before proceeding
Prices and ratings visible in search results — don't click into each product
Use the left sidebar filters for category, price range, ratings
Search bar is at top-left
After searching, results appear in left panel — read directly
For directions, click 'Directions' button then enter start/end points
Distance and time are shown in the directions panel — read directly
Enter query in the main search bar and press Enter
Results appear below — may need to scroll to see full output
IMPORTANT: For multi-item queries (e.g. comparing two materials), query EACH item separately. Don't assume one query covers both.
After getting first result, use update_state to save it, then query the second item
For step-by-step solutions, look for 'Step-by-step solution' link
Scores and standings visible on main pages — read directly
Use top navigation for sport-specific sections
For stats pages: if 'No Data Available' appears, try a different filter or navigate to a different stats URL
NBA stats URL pattern: /nba/stats/player/_/stat/rebounds/seasontype/2
For Western/Eastern conference filters, look for dropdown selectors on the stats page
If a direct URL returns 404, use the BBC search bar instead to find the content
BBC restructures URLs frequently — don't rely on direct section URLs
Use the search function at top of page to find specific topics
For Sport sections, navigate via the Sport tab in the main navigation
IMPORTANT: Apply ALL requested filters one at a time. After each filter, verify it appears as an active chip/tag before proceeding
Filter sidebar is on the left — click to expand each filter category
After applying filters, the result count updates at the top of the results list
Some filters may require scrolling within the filter panel to find them
Use Advanced Search for date-filtered queries: arxiv.org/search/advanced
For specific date ranges, use the date_range field in advanced search
Article counts are shown at the top of search results
For section-specific searches, use the subject field in advanced search (e.g. eess for Electrical Engineering)
Definitions appear directly on the page — read them without clicking further
Multiple meanings are listed — scan all of them before answering
